# Zenflo Studios

> Zenflo Studios is a creative studio in Boca Raton, South Florida (roots in Colombia, working in English and Spanish, remote-friendly) that helps small product brands grow: brand identity, custom Shopify stores, web design, monthly content & social, SEO, and in-house product photography and video. The studio also runs "Run Your Own Shopify," a live monthly class for beginners.

Who it's for: small and early-stage product brands — beauty, wellness, food, apparel, home goods — that want one studio to handle brand, store, and content instead of juggling freelancers.

## Services

- [Brand identity](https://zenflostudios.com/#services): logo, brand book, packaging.
- [Shopify stores](https://zenflostudios.com/#services): custom Liquid themes built for speed, mobile-first, and conversion; subscriptions, bundles, upsell apps.
- [Web design](https://zenflostudios.com/#services): landing pages and full websites designed around business goals, not templates.
- [Content & social](https://zenflostudios.com/#services): monthly content calendars, reels, carousels, stories — shot, edited, written, and scheduled.
- [SEO + growth](https://zenflostudios.com/#services): technical audits, keyword maps, backlink campaigns, monthly reporting.
- [Creative studio](https://zenflostudios.com/#services): content filming, product photography, printables, digital catalogs.

## Courses

- [Run Your Own Shopify](https://zenflostudios.com/courses): live monthly class for Shopify beginners. The first 30 minutes — the full lesson plus Q&A — are free for everyone. Staying for the guided build hour is $29; the seven-class series pass with the replay library is $129. Next class: Wednesday, August 19, 2026, 7pm EST.

## Contact

- Email: hello@zenflostudios.com
